name: SUPA Consolidated Inc.
business: SUPA Consolidated Inc. sold its transportation technology assets and is transitioning to food technology. It acquired 1,157 commercial ice/water vending machines and is evaluating acquisitions in food tech. As of December 31, 2025, it had no revenue and no full-time employees.

exposures.sentence: We intend to realign our corporate strategy and resources toward identifying, developing, and acquiring food technology businesses and assets.

the Company acquired 1,157 commercial ice/water vending machines, valued at $40,809 based on supporting purchase invoices, and assumed a related party loan obligation of $121,200, previously incurred by SUPA.
